title: Verify Google Search Console (3 products)
description: Verify all 3 products in Google Search Console and submit sitemaps. Robots.txt and sitemap.xml are already live. This single action accelerates Google indexing from weeks to days.
risks: Domain verification may take up to 48h
Requires Google account with Search Console access
requiredApproval: CEO action — Google account login required
notes: sitemap.xml at /sitemap.xml confirmed live for QuickQR. ImageCompress and OGImageGen need verification.

title: Connect Google Analytics 4 — All Products
description: Create GA4 property, add NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID env var to all 3 products on Vercel. GA4 code is already deployed — only env var is missing. Immediately activates user, session, and pageview tracking.
risks: GA4 Measurement ID must match property
Wrong env var placement in Vercel UI
requiredApproval: CEO action — create GA4 property at analytics.google.com
notes: GA4 Script already in all 3 layout.tsx files with NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID guard. Activation requires zero code changes.

title: OGImageGen Product Hunt Launch
description: Launch OGImageGen on Product Hunt. All assets prepared in PRODUCT_HUNT_ASSETS.md: tagline, description, first comment, maker comment, media list. Best launch window is Tuesday–Thursday. Top-100 finish drives 2,000–5,000 visitors in 24 hours.
risks: Low upvote count if launched wrong time
Product quality criticism if UX issues exist
Requires active community engagement on launch day
notes: Product Hunt assets ready at projects/ogimagegen/PRODUCT_HUNT_ASSETS.md. Needs OG image and maker profile.

title: OGImageGen SEO: 57 → 85+
description: Apply the same SEO playbook used on QuickQR (34→82) to OGImageGen. Add JSON-LD, FAQ section, H1 optimization, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, Open Graph image, internal cross-links. OGImageGen is weakest in portfolio at 57/100.
risks: SEO results take 2–8 weeks to appear
Google indexing delay despite sitemaps
notes: QuickQR SEO playbook documented in company/SEO_IMPROVEMENTS.md. Reusable for OGImageGen.

title: Community Launch — Reddit + Hacker News
description: Post QuickQR or ImageCompress to r/SideProject, r/webdev, and Show HN. Social media posts drafted in each product's growth/SOCIAL_MEDIA_PLAN.md. Free channel with potential for 1,000–3,000 visitors if post resonates.
risks: Reddit self-promotion rules — may be removed
HN 'Show HN' requires interesting technical angle
Low engagement risk if posted at wrong time
notes: Social posts drafted. Best posting time: Tuesday 9am EST or Thursday 10am EST.

title: DevOS Public Announcement (Twitter/Blog)
description: Publish a blog post and Twitter thread about DevOS — an autonomous AI software company that shipped 3 products in 3 days using a 7-agent pipeline. Developer community angle. Unique story with measurable results.
risks: Story may not resonate with developer audience
Potential criticism of AI-generated products
No control over response volume
notes: Could drive backlinks to all 3 products simultaneously. SEO value of developer community coverage is high.

title: Monetization Sprint — Stripe Integration
description: Integrate Stripe into the highest-traffic product. Options: Ko-fi donation button (30 min), pay-what-you-want download, or API rate-limited free tier with paid upgrade. First revenue event transforms Q3 financial position.
risks: Revenue depends on traffic — which is currently unmeasured
Conversion rate unknown without analytics data
Stripe account setup requires business verification
notes: Must have analytics connected first to know which product has most traffic. Analytics is a dependency.

title: Generate og.png for QuickQR
description: Use OGImageGen to create a 1200×630 og.png for QuickQR. Currently QuickQR's social meta tags reference /og.png which does not exist, causing blank preview cards when shared on Twitter/LinkedIn/Slack.
risks: None — trivially reversible
notes: Go to ogimagegen.vercel.app, generate image, download, add to projects/quickqr/public/og.png

title: Connect Live APIs (GA4, Vercel, GitHub)
description: Implement real API calls in the datasource layer (ga4.ts, vercel.ts, github.ts). Replace mock data with live data from GA4 Data API, Vercel API, and GitHub API. Dashboard panels show real numbers.
risks: API rate limits on GA4 free tier
Vercel API token scope management
Server-side vs client-side data fetching architecture decisions
requiredApproval: None — engineering task, requires VERCEL_TOKEN and GITHUB_TOKEN
notes: Datasource layer already designed for this. Each file has MOCK constant. Real implementation is function body swap only.

title: touchcut Legal Resolution
description: Resolve 3 open P0/P1 legal decisions blocking touchcut: yt-dlp ToS compliance, copyright of derived works, and GPU pricing model. Requires legal counsel or CEO executive decision.
risks: yt-dlp violates YouTube ToS — may require completely different architecture
Copyright liability unknown until legal review
High development cost after legal resolution
Uncertainty makes planning difficult
notes: Low score because of low confidence and development time. If legal resolves favorably, touchcut becomes highest-priority sprint.
